title: Onboarding file browser with directory filtering
purpose: Displays a list of files in the codebase with directory filters and search capabilities for onboarding purposes.
module_context: Exports a React component that fetches and displays files and directories from an API, with filtering capabilities based on directory selection.

steps.content: Access the current project context from the onboarding layout.
Initialize state for files, directories, selected directory, and loading status.
Fetch files and directories when the project context changes.
Filter files based on the selected directory.
Render a loading indicator while data is being fetched.
Display directory tabs for filtering files.
Render a grid of file links with directory information.
Check if the project context is available.
IF the project is not available, exit early.
Set the loading state to true.
Fetch files and directories concurrently from the API.
Update the files and directories state with the fetched data.
Reset the loading state after data fetching completes.
Check if all files should be displayed.
IF displaying all files, return the complete file list.
ELSE find the selected directory in the directories list.
IF the directory is not found, return the complete file list.
Create a set of file paths from the selected directory.
Filter the files to only include those in the selected directory.
